winning_test.source:
import pytest

from gradebook.analytics import letter_grade


def test_letter_grade_assigns_a_at_exactly_90():
    assert letter_grade(90) == "A"
winning_test.targeted_behavior: At the exact A/B boundary, a score of 90 must receive an A; the mutant instead returns B.
